title: NemoClaw OpenClaw Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for nemoclaw/openclaw.plugin.json — the OpenClaw plugin manifest that declares the plugin identity and its configuration schema.

commandAliases.description: Runtime command names that resolve to this plugin's handlers, such as chat slash commands.

name.description: Command name that belongs to this plugin.

kind.description: Marks the alias as a chat slash command rather than a root CLI command.

activation.description: OpenClaw activation planner metadata. Use onStartup=true when plugin registration must run during Gateway startup.

onStartup.description: Whether OpenClaw should import the plugin during Gateway startup.

configSchema.description: JSON Schema object describing the plugin's configuration fields.
